author: SantiMod
content:
@everyone  Community Tournament Announcement  

A new community-made mini-game, Tufa Attack, is releasing on May 8th! This release will be accompanied by a tournament powered by Star Atlas.

From May 8th to May 14th, put your Tufa Attack skills to the test and see who's the best fighter in the galaxy! 

With ~$5,000 worth of prizes, the stakes are high. 

To learn more and compete, start at https://tufaattack.com/ and ⁠unknown in the Tufa Attack Tournament Discord category! 

Check the prizes here
